signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2.2% YoY, Below Forecasts; GDP Outlook Trimmed to 2.0%** | YES | MED  
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 (from 2.0% in Jan-Feb), missing market expectations of 2.4%, amid contained pressures before Iran conflict volatility.[2] ING trimmed its 2026 GDP forecast to 2.0% YoY (from 2.2%), citing energy risks despite extra budget app
